title: M.Y Nylon Parafoil Stunt Kite 60 x 51 cm | Kids Toys | Kids Kite | Outdoor, Park, Beach Toys
features: Take Flight - Enjoy the outdoors with our "M.Y Nylon Parafoil Stunt Kite 60 x 51 cm" and have an amazing classic kite experience

Fantastic Quality - The kite is well made with high quality materials to create a lightweight, durable kite which can perform cool tricks. Plus it comes with a storage travel bag so you can take your kite wherever you go
Travel Bag - This kite comes with a convenient small compact travel bag (assorted bag colours, one sent at random - black, red, yellow, orange, blue, green)
Unforgettable Memories - Create long lasting memories with your family and friends on nice sunny days out with a breeze, and watch your kite fly in awe!
description: Easy to fly dual line parafoil stunt kite with no frame assembly, just unfold and fly! Get flying and perform cool kite tricks with the dual control lines. Fantastic for days at the beach or out at the park - ideal for beginner and intermediate kite flyers. The long lines allow your kite to soar high without too much restriction. Perform cool dives and aerial tricks! Kite measures 60 x 51 cm, made from ripstop nylon.
